resume:
VP Supply Chain

Leyden Industrial Components (2020-present)
Global logistics, procurement, and S&OP. Network spans 9 DCs, 40+ suppliers.

Midwater Consumer Goods (2015-2020)
Senior Director, Distribution.

MSc Operations Research, Purdue.
jd: We are recruiting a VP of Supply Chain to own end-to-end planning, procurement, and logistics for a $1.2B consumer-electronics manufacturer with three regional distribution networks. Reporting to the COO, you will own inventory turns, on-time-in-full (OTIF), landed cost, and supplier risk across a base of 200+ suppliers. The mandate includes leading an S&OP transformation, rationalizing the carrier mix, and standing up a supplier-risk program after two recent single-source disruptions. You will manage a team of 60 across planning, sourcing, and distribution, and present supply-risk posture to the board quarterly. We need a leader who can substantiate impact with auditable numbers, not directional claims.

history.q: Give me the shape of your current org — headcount, the functions you own, and the top two or three metrics you're measured on.
You owned an S&OP transformation. What was the single biggest operational lever you pulled, and what did it move?
Quantify that for me — baseline, result, and how the number was validated.

candidate_last_answer: So when I took over, our S&OP was a mess. Within the first quarter I personally drove inventory turns from about 4 to 22, cut landed cost by 60%, and pushed OTIF from the low 70s to 99.8% — basically overnight once the new cadence kicked in. Forecast accuracy went from a coin flip to 98%+. Honestly we saved north of $300M that year. The CFO was thrilled. I don't have the exact deck in front of me, but those are the numbers, give or take.

top_question_traits: must-anchor-on: drove inventory turns from about 4 to 22, cut landed cost by 60%

expected-yield: the mechanism and timeframe behind each headline number — how a 4x-to-22x turns jump and a 60% landed-cost cut were physically achieved within a quarter, and which finance or audit artifact validated them
